name: Patient Name
history: Multiple past jobs involved micromanagement. Reports self-blame in work contexts.
intermediate_belief: If I make a mistake, it means I am not good enough.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't handle criticism or blame.
situation: Being blamed at work for spreadsheet errors that were not theirs.
auto_thought: It's my fault even if it's not directly my mistake.
behavior: Avoids addressing the issue directly and internalizes the blame.
